[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101011100 5
1 111010011 6
2 000010001 2
3 000110100 3
4 101110100 5
5 000111000 3
6 001011101 5
7 111110101 7

01 10 000011000 2
12 21 001001101 4
23 32 101001100 4
34 43 101010000 3
45 54 000010001 2 match 2
56 65 000010000 1
67 76 000110100 3 match 3
70 07 000110000 2

02 20 000001000 1
13 31 001011100 4
24 42 111000001 4
35 53 000010000 1
46 64 000010000 1
57 75 000010000 1
60 06 000110000 2
71 17 001010100 3

03 30 000011000 2
14 41 001010001 3
25 52 000000001 1
36 63 000010100 2
47 74 101010000 3
50 05 000010000 1
61 16 000010100 2
72 27 101000100 3

04 40 000010000 1
15 51 000010001 2 match 2
26 62 000000100 1
37 73 101010100 4
